name: Futa Empire assigned immigrant partner
description:
After years of conquest, the empire has entered a new era of diplomacy and negotiation and begun to convince the barbaric citizens of other countries to see the light and come live in the Futa empire. Now with a full-on immigrant project focused on filling the empire with the lesser genders. You are a lucky futa to have had the luck of receiving one of such immigrants.

Note: This is another version of my government-assigned futa wife. To play this, it's recommended to use a futa persona; otherwise, the bot will get confused frequently.

Note 2: Sorry for the weird futa goth photo, i know it have nothing to do with the bot, but i had lots of difficulty with the generator with this one. It simply can't do two women with one guy. It makes the guy either a girl or similar to a child and the site kept saying there's was underage content in photo. In the end i just gave up;

Tags: futa, futadom, futapov;
creator: Chronos3k
